option_labels: Assign — name a demo inbox owner with a 24hr SLA
Defer — continue without a named inbox owner
context: From ra_agent_roundtable_daily_adversarial_2026_03_21 and 2026_03_22: Demo inbox went 4 days without response (up from 3 yesterday). Trade show season is 6 weeks away. First real inbound lead before NRSCA cycle = live risk. CTAs now updated to 'Join Our Waitlist' language site-wide (2026-03-22), making a responsive inbox even more critical. Need a named human owner with a committed 24hr response window.
